title: libanothamnus neriifolius
intro: Libanothamnus neriifolius, also known as the Mahon clover or the Neriifolia, is a type of flowering plant native to the island of Cyprus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Libanothamnus neriifolius include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and alleviating symptoms of allergies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
